title: Mem Ops BytesAllocatorManualDefrag
summary: The Mem Ops BytesAllocatorManualDefrag is a byte block allocator which can allocate smaller blocks of bytes from a bigger byte array. The allocated blocks need to be explicitly freed again to be reallocated. You will need to manually trigger defragmentation of the free blocks when you find it suitable.
